pass_if_all_true: Officio ACK or missing-authority WARN exists before implementation.
Taskpack is not treated as role authority.
All writes remain inside allowed IMPERIUM_NEW_GENERATION paths.
One isolated implementation slice exists under LABS/MECHANICUS_PANEL_SLICE_V0_1.
The slice contains the five required zones.
The slice is visibly grounded on included references but not copied blindly.
The slice is non-generic and visually stronger than previous rough implementations.
Commit is created if gates pass.
warn_conditions: Officio source missing/incomplete but explicit missing-authority WARN exists.
Some values are still mock/static but clearly marked.
The slice is not yet integrated into the main shell, but the isolated lab is strong and reviewable.
Push fails due to credentials/network, but commit and evidence exist.
block_conditions: Taskpack is used as role authority.
Work spills outside allowed write scope.
The result fakes truth or connected states.
No screenshots or no reports exist.
The implementation attempts to rewrite full Sanctum.
